features.title: Baseline Health Repair
features.description: Repair the minimal repo-scoped baseline blockers by fixing the middleware lint issue, refreshing stale global unified spec statements, applying the approved formatting-only cleanup surfaced by `pnpm format:check`, and updating `.harness/skills/init.sh` so placeholder Rust crates do not falsely block the current Web-first baseline, while treating exact Node 20 verification as a local execution precondition rather than a repo defect.
acceptance_criteria: Under Node 20.10.0, pnpm lint no longer fails on apps/web/src/middleware.ts.
docs/specs/global_unified_spec.md accurately reflects the current baseline for ESLint/Prettier, app CI/test gate, workspace app dependencies, and Vitest integration.
docs/specs/global_unified_spec.md does not overclaim Playwright integration if Playwright is still absent.
The approved 12-file formatting cleanup is applied and pnpm format:check passes.
.harness/skills/init.sh skips Rust verification when the Rust workspace is still placeholder-only instead of failing on missing cargo.
No edits are made to docs/README.md, docs/architecture/test_matrix.md, docs/specs/interface_spec.md, or docs/specs/phase1_scope.md in this change.
Verification records distinguish repo-fixable issues from the local-only Node version requirement.
The standard startup/verification path is rerun and exact Node 20 verification is either demonstrated or recorded as unavailable.
test_needs: Re-run format:check after the approved formatting cleanup
definition_of_done: Required verification items pass or have documented exceptions
No unrelated F2-00 docs are modified in this change
No unresolved blocking review findings remain
